title: Chain 1/8: Schedule a Viewing
scene: 你在网上看到一套公寓，打电话预约看房。（对话链：租房入住）

turns.cn: 您好，Oak 公寓租赁。
turns.en: Hello, Oak Apartments leasing.

turns.cn: 我想看一室一厅，明天下午有空吗？
turns.en: I'd like to see a one-bedroom. Any openings tomorrow afternoon?

turns.cn: 三点可以，请问怎么称呼？
turns.en: Three PM works. May I have your name?

turns.cn: 张伟，需要带什么材料？
turns.en: Zhang Wei. What should I bring?

turns.cn: 身份证就行，到了前台登记。
turns.en: Just ID. Check in at the front desk.

turns.cn: 好的，明天见。
turns.en: Okay. See you tomorrow.

title: Chain 2/8: Apartment Tour
scene: 中介带你参观公寓。（对话链：租房入住）

turns.cn: 欢迎，这套一室一厅，月租一千八。
turns.en: Welcome. This is a one-bedroom, eighteen hundred a month.

turns.cn: 水电费包含在房租里吗？
turns.en: Are utilities included in the rent?

turns.cn: 不含，暖气另算，大概每月八十。
turns.en: No, heat is separate, about eighty a month.

turns.cn: 可以养宠物吗？
turns.en: Are pets allowed?

turns.cn: 可以养猫，狗需要额外押金。
turns.en: Cats are fine. Dogs require an extra deposit.

turns.cn: 什么时候可以入住？
turns.en: When is it available?

turns.cn: 下月一号，要先交一个月押金。
turns.en: The first of next month. One month's deposit required.

title: Chain 3/8: Apply for Lease
scene: 你看中了，问中介申请流程。（对话链：租房入住）

turns.cn: 我想申请这套，需要什么材料？
turns.en: I'd like to apply. What documents do you need?

turns.cn: 申请表、收入证明、推荐信。
turns.en: Application form, proof of income, and a reference letter.

turns.cn: 申请费多少？多久出结果？
turns.en: What's the application fee? How long for approval?

turns.cn: 五十块，通常三到五个工作日。
turns.en: Fifty dollars. Usually three to five business days.

turns.cn: 好，我今天填好发您。
turns.en: Okay. I'll fill it out and send it today.

turns.cn: 收到后我帮您跟进。
turns.en: I'll follow up once I receive it.

title: Chain 4/8: Sign the Lease
scene: 申请通过，你来签租约拿钥匙。（对话链：租房入住）

turns.cn: 恭喜通过，这是租约，请过目。
turns.en: Congratulations. Here's the lease. Please review it.

turns.cn: 租期一年，提前退租要赔一个月对吧？
turns.en: One-year term. Early termination costs one month's rent, right?

turns.cn: 对，首月房租加押金今天一起付。
turns.en: Correct. First month's rent plus deposit due today.

turns.cn: 刷卡可以吗？钥匙几把？
turns.en: Can I pay by card? How many keys?

turns.cn: 可以，大门和信箱各一把。
turns.en: Yes. One for the door and one for the mailbox.

turns.cn: 谢谢，我周末搬进来。
turns.en: Thank you. I'll move in this weekend.

title: Chain 5/8: Set Up Utilities
scene: 搬进新家，你打电话开通电费账户。（对话链：租房入住）

turns.cn: 电力公司客服，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Power company. How can I help you?

turns.cn: 我搬了新家，想开通电账户。
turns.en: I just moved and need to set up an electricity account.

turns.cn: 请提供新地址和社会安全号后四位。
turns.en: May I have your new address and the last four of your Social Security number?

turns.cn: 456 Oak Avenue，后四位是1234。
turns.en: Four fifty-six Oak Avenue. Last four digits are one two three four.

turns.cn: 从明天起生效，首月账单下月寄出。
turns.en: Service starts tomorrow. Your first bill comes next month.

turns.cn: 可以自动扣款吗？
turns.en: Can I set up auto-pay?

turns.cn: 可以，我帮您登记银行账户。
turns.en: Yes. I'll register your bank account for that.

title: Chain 6/8: Report a Repair
scene: 入住两周后空调不制冷，你联系物业。（对话链：租房入住）

turns.cn: 物业维修，请问什么问题？
turns.en: Building maintenance. What's the issue?

turns.cn: 空调不制冷了，房间很热。
turns.en: The AC isn't cooling. The apartment is really hot.

turns.cn: 您的房号是多少？
turns.en: What's your unit number?

turns.cn: 802，过滤器上个月刚换过。
turns.en: 802. I changed the filter last month.

turns.cn: 我下午两点过去看看。
turns.en: I'll come by around two PM.

turns.cn: 需要在家等吗？
turns.en: Do I need to be home?

turns.cn: 最好有人在，方便开门。
turns.en: It's better if someone's there to let me in.

title: Chain 7/8: Laundry Room
scene: 你在公寓洗衣房，洗衣机被占满了。（对话链：租房入住）

turns.cn: 不好意思，这台洗衣机是您用的吗？
turns.en: Excuse me, is this your laundry in the washer?

turns.cn: 是的，还有五分钟就好。
turns.en: Yes, about five more minutes.

turns.cn: 烘干机有空吗？
turns.en: Are any dryers available?

turns.cn: 左边那台刚空出来。
turns.en: The one on the left just opened up.

turns.cn: 谢谢，这栋楼洗衣房几点关？
turns.en: Thanks. What time does the laundry room close?

turns.cn: 晚上十点。
turns.en: Ten PM.

title: Chain 8/8: Lease Renewal
scene: 租约快到期，房东问你续不续租。（对话链：租房入住）

turns.cn: 张先生，租约下月到期，续租吗？
turns.en: Mr. Zhang, your lease ends next month. Renewing?

turns.cn: 想续，租金会涨吗？
turns.en: I'd like to. Will the rent go up?

turns.cn: 涨五十，一千八百五，其他条件不变。
turns.en: Fifty more, eighteen fifty. Other terms stay the same.

turns.cn: 能接受，能签两年吗？
turns.en: I can accept that. Can we do a two-year lease?

turns.cn: 两年可以，不涨第二次。
turns.en: Two years works. No second increase.

turns.cn: 好，我下周来签。
turns.en: Great. I'll come sign next week.
